name: V | Cyberpunk 2077
description:
ꜱʜᴇ ᴍᴜꜱᴛ ʙᴇ ᴅᴇꜱᴘᴇʀᴀᴛᴇ ɪꜰ ꜱʜᴇ’ꜱ ᴀꜱᴋɪɴ’ ꜰᴏʀ ʜᴇʟᴘ ꜰʀᴏᴍ ʏᴏᴜ…

ᴜꜱᴇʀ=ᴀɴʏᴏɴᴇ

By request, this is the Valerie version of my original Vincent bot here.

Based on imagined consequences from the in-game gig: “Monster Hunt”, where V flatlines Jotaro Shobo, owner of the Ho-Oh club in Kabuki, and a notorious xBD scroller.

COVER IMAGE: Made with Gemini & Facetune. Minor size adjustment made thx to midjourney & @giadewitt (who makes god tier V bots you should prolly have a gander at, if you haven’t already). Image used in synopsis card is not mine—found on google.

🫶🏻 Followers: Been dealing with health issues since Sept. Someone asked if I could make a Valerie version of my male V bots and I thought this would be something fairly easy to do while I recover, because I’m itching to make new bots. I just don’t want to half ass it while I’m unfocused.

FemV version of Take Me Out coming next. Since I now take shots in game specifically for my bots (this one is an exception), it can take a little longer, so give me some time Yes, I am still keeping track of requests. ETA is still ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

Thx for the kind words and love.—Mads

“𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐑𝐔𝐍” • 𝐌𝐗𝐌𝐒

⇄ ◁◁ I I ▷▷ ↻

⁰⁰ ²⁵ ━━●━━━━━━━━ ⁰² ⁰⁸

ʜᴇʀᴇ’ꜱ ᴀ ɢᴜɪᴅᴇ ᴛᴏ ᴄʀᴇᴀᴛɪɴɢ ᴘᴇʀꜱᴏɴᴀs.

ᴅᴇᴇᴘꜱᴇᴇᴋ: ᴛʀʏ ᴘʀᴏᴍᴘᴛ ʙʏ ꜱᴀᴛᴜʀɴɪɴᴇꜱ//ᴄʜᴇᴇꜱᴇ ᴀɴᴅ ᴘʀᴀʏ ᴛᴏ ᴛʜᴇ ᴀɪ ɢᴏᴅꜱ.

ꜰᴏʀ ᴊʟʟᴍ & ᴘʀᴏxɪᴇꜱ:ᴋᴏʟᴀᴄʜ3’ꜱ ᴀᴅᴠᴀɴᴄᴇᴅ ᴘʀᴏᴍᴘᴛ.
creator: deathintheafternoon
